content: We need to decide whether to run a limited beta of the AI support assistant. The queue pressure is high, but privacy is a concern.
I will search for the current queue metrics and privacy guidelines.
{"results": [{"title": "Q2 Queue Report", "description": "Median wait time is 45 minutes, exceeding the 15-minute target."}]}
Based on the data, the median wait time is 45 minutes. However, we must ensure any beta uses redacted transcripts to comply with privacy guidelines. I recommend a limited, redacted beta.
